intro.heading:
India's most sacred
pilgrimage circuit
paragraphs: The Char Dham Yatra — four sacred shrines in the Garhwal Himalayas — is one of Hinduism's most auspicious pilgrimages, undertaken by lakhs of devotees each year.

At Explore Case, we've guided hundreds of families and pilgrims through this divine journey. Every package is planned meticulously so you can focus entirely on prayer and the breathtaking Himalayan landscape.

dhams.name: Yamunotri
dhams.description: The source of the sacred Yamuna river, Yamunotri is set at 3,293m in Uttarkashi. Pilgrims trek 6km from Janki Chatti through dense forests and hot water springs to reach the revered temple of Goddess Yamuna.

dhams.name: Gangotri
dhams.description: The origin of the sacred Ganga at 3,048m. The 18th-century temple built by Gorkha commander Amar Singh Thapa stands surrounded by towering snow peaks and the thundering Bhagirathi river.

dhams.name: Kedarnath
dhams.description: One of the 12 Jyotirlingas of Lord Shiva at 3,583m in the Garhwal Himalayas. The 8th-century stone temple built by Adi Shankaracharya remains one of India's most visited pilgrimage sites.

dhams.name: Badrinath
dhams.description: Dedicated to Lord Vishnu at 3,133m along the Alaknanda river with a dramatic backdrop of Neelkanth peak. The final dham on the circuit, the brightly painted temple is one of the 108 Divya Desams.

items.name: Do Dham Package
items.description: Kedarnath & Badrinath — the two most revered shrines. Includes AC cab, accommodation, and guide.

items.name: Full Char Dham Yatra
items.description: All four dhams — Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath & Badrinath. Premium stays and dedicated guide.

items.name: Kedarnath Helicopter Yatra
items.description: Fly directly to Kedarnath. Scenic Himalayan views, VIP pooja arrangements, and luxury accommodation.

items.title: AC Transportation
items.text: Well-maintained AC vehicles with experienced Himalayan drivers for the entire Char Dham route.

items.title: Hotel Accommodation
items.text: Carefully selected hotels and dharamshalas near each shrine, from standard to premium.

items.title: Spiritual Guide
items.text: Knowledgeable guides who explain the history, mythology, and rituals at each dham.

items.title: Vegetarian Meals
items.text: Pure sattvic vegetarian meals included in select packages, prepared hygienically en route.

items.title: Helicopter Booking
items.text: Complete helicopter booking and permit management for Kedarnath Helicopter Yatra.

items.title: All Permits & Passes
items.text: Registration, biometric verification, and all required passes managed by our team.
